topic: Target encoding and its leakage risk
scope: Powerful but dangerous; the leakage callout lives here.
key_concepts: Target encoding replaces the category label with the mean corresponding value of the intended target variable across that group.
Very powerful for capturing distinct linear relationships while compressing high cardinality spaces.
Direct calculation on the complete dataset creates massive train-test contamination (target leakage).

definitions.definition: Implementasi pengubahan rasio fitur berbasis rekap agregat ukuran target keluaran modelnya.

examples: Instead of one-hotting 1,000 ZIP codes, replace each ZIP code with the historical mean home price of that specific code.
